CREQ_greet.title: greet produces a greeting
CREQ_greet.content: The function greet shall return a greeting for the given name and raise GreetError when the name is empty.

CREQ_greeter.title: Greeter class
CREQ_greeter.content: The class Greeter shall expose a say() method returning a fixed greeting string.

CREQ_greet_error.title: GreetError class
CREQ_greet_error.content: The class GreetError shall be raised when greet is called with an empty name.
